question: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
answer: Based on the IEC 60599 standards, an Arc Discharge (FM-006) is likely the root cause class for the sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline on Transformer T-018. To confirm the diagnosis, recommend a Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) for C2H4 gas. C2H4 is a key gas associated with Arc Discharge and is often used as a confirmatory measurement to support the diagnosis.
